description: Release preparation. Reconciles [Unreleased] CHANGELOG.md from xt reports + commit subjects in a tag range. changelog-drafter (READ_ONLY) produces bundle synthesis first; changelog-keeper edits CHANGELOG.md. Does NOT bump version, build, commit, tag, push, or publish — operator handles those via /releasing skill.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: prepare release by reconciling [Unreleased] CHANGELOG.md from {{prev_tag}}..{{next_tag}}.
SCOPE: CHANGELOG.md only.
NON_GOALS: no version bump; no build; no commit/tag/push/publish; no code edits.
VALIDATION: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] section populated with Added/Changed/Fixed/Removed entries reflecting commits + xt reports in range.
ACCEPTANCE: operator runs /releasing and sees populated [Unreleased] ready for version bump.

Release prep chain: drafter synthesizes, keeper writes.

steps.title: changelog-drafter:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: READ_ONLY bundle synthesis from {{prev_tag}}..{{next_tag}}. Group commits and xt reports by category (Added/Changed/Fixed/Removed).
INPUTS: git log {{prev_tag}}..{{next_tag}}; .xtrm/reports/*.md in range.
OUTPUTS: structured draft markdown — categorized bullet list with PR/commit refs. No file edits.
SCOPE: read-only synthesis.
NON_GOALS: no edits; no publishing; no tagging.

steps.title: changelog-keeper:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: edit CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] section using drafter's structured draft.
INPUTS: changelog-drafter's draft; current CHANGELOG.md.
OUTPUTS: edited CHANGELOG.md with [Unreleased] populated. Preserves existing entries below [Unreleased]. Single-file diff.
SCOPE: CHANGELOG.md only.
NON_GOALS: no version bump; no build; no commit/tag/push/publish; no other files touched.
